home.title: Rise — Real Investment & Smart Estates
home.description: Rise builds and manages high-end real estate portfolios. Villas, towers, compounds and commercial assets, selected for long-term yield.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Browse the Rise portfolio: villas, penthouses, apartments, compounds and commercial assets for sale, for rent and off-plan.

about.title: About
about.description: Since 2009, Rise has grown from a single tower into a portfolio of more than 120 delivered assets across the region.

services.title: Services
services.description: Investment advisory, buying, selling, property management and consulting — one team across the whole asset lifecycle.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Talk to the Rise investment desk. Offices in New Cairo, appointments Sunday to Thursday.

hero.sceneLabel: An animated skyline in which a house, an apartment tower, a luxury villa, a gated compound and a commercial building are constructed piece by piece.

featured.title: Featured properties
featured.description: A short list from the current portfolio — each one underwritten, inspected and ready for viewing.

services.title: A team for the whole asset lifecycle
services.description: Most firms hand you off between five different companies. Rise keeps acquisition, delivery and management under one roof.

stats.title: Sixteen years of compounding
stats.description: We measure ourselves on delivered assets and realised returns — not on listings posted.

why.title: Built for investors, not browsers
why.description: Four commitments that shape every deal we take on.

underwriting.title: Underwritten, not advertised
underwriting.body: Every asset arrives with a yield model, a five-year cost forecast and the comparables we used. If the numbers don't hold, we don't list it.

delivery.title: We deliver what we sell
delivery.body: Rise builds and hands over its own developments. The team that signs the contract is the team on site at handover.

management.title: Managed after handover
management.body: Tenanting, maintenance, collections and reporting. Your asset keeps earning without becoming your second job.

transparency.title: One number, no surprises
transparency.body: Fees, registration, maintenance and service charges are quoted on day one. The price you're shown is the price you pay.

process.title: From first call to first return
process.description: Four steps, roughly ninety days from brief to income.

brief.title: Brief
brief.body: We map your capital, horizon and risk appetite against what the market is actually pricing.

select.title: Select
select.body: You get a shortlist of three to five assets, each with a full yield model — never a catalogue dump.

acquire.title: Acquire
acquire.body: We negotiate, handle due diligence, contracts and registration, and hand you the keys.

manage.title: Manage
manage.body: We tenant it, maintain it and report quarterly. You watch the return, not the paperwork.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: A portfolio is a long relationship. Here's how ours have gone.

one.quote: I've bought through four developers in this city. Rise is the only one whose handover date matched the contract — and the only one still answering the phone two years later.
one.name: Karim Al-Mansouri

two.quote: They talked me out of the unit I wanted and into one yielding three points higher. That conversation told me everything about who they work for.
two.name: Nadia Haddad

three.quote: We placed a fund allocation across six Rise units. The quarterly reporting is cleaner than what we get from listed vehicles.
three.name: Omar Sabbagh
three.role: Head of Real Assets, Levant Fund

four.quote: First-time buyer, and nobody made me feel small for asking basic questions. The yield model was explained line by line until I understood it.
four.name: Layla Fouad

cta.title: Let's find the asset that fits your capital
cta.description: Thirty minutes with an advisor, no obligation. Bring your budget and horizon — we'll bring the numbers.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Every asset currently on the Rise book. Filter by what matters to your model.

about.title: We started with one tower and a stubborn idea
about.lead: That a real estate firm should be judged on what its clients earn, not on what it manages to sell.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: Rise began in 2009 with a single mixed-use tower in New Cairo and four people who had all quit the same brokerage on the same week. We'd spent years watching buyers sold whatever the firm needed to move that quarter, and we thought the whole model was upside down.
story.body2: So we inverted it. We only list what we'd put our own money into, we publish the yield model behind every asset, and we stay on after handover to manage what we sold. It's slower. It costs us listings. It has also meant that most of our growth for sixteen years has come from clients buying a second, third and fourth time.
story.body3: Today Rise has delivered 124 assets across residential, commercial and mixed-use, with 2.4 billion EGP under management. The team is 48 people. The idea hasn't changed.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: To make premium real estate investment legible — so a first-time buyer and an institutional allocator can both see exactly what they're buying, what it costs and what it will return.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: To be the firm the region's investors call first, because the number we quote on day one is still the number on the day they exit.

one.title: Numbers before narrative
one.body: If we can't model it, we won't sell it.

two.title: Stay on the hook
two.body: We manage what we deliver. Selling is not the finish line.

three.title: Say the hard thing
three.body: We've talked clients out of more deals than we've talked them into.

four.title: Build to last
four.body: Specified for the thirty-year owner, not the launch photos.

2009.title: Four people, one tower
2009.body: Rise is founded in New Cairo. The first asset — a 14-floor mixed-use tower — sells out before topping-out.

2013.title: The management arm
2013.body: Clients keep asking us to run what we sold them. We stop saying no and open Rise Management.

2016.title: First compound
2016.body: Rise Gardens: 88 townhouses, delivered eleven weeks early. Still our benchmark for handover.

2019.title: One billion under management
2019.body: The portfolio crosses 1B EGP. Sixty-one percent of new capital comes from existing clients.

2022.title: Commercial & institutional
2022.body: First fund allocation. Rise opens a dedicated desk for institutional real assets.

2025.title: 124 assets, 2.4B under management
2025.body: Rise passes 890 investors served, with a 94% management-renewal rate.

team.title: Who you'll actually be dealing with
team.description: No call centre. You get a named advisor from the first call to the last report.

one.name: Yousef Darwish
one.bio: Sixteen years underwriting assets in this market. Signs off on every acquisition Rise makes.

two.name: Mariam Zaki
two.bio: Built the yield model the whole firm runs on. Ex-institutional real assets.

three.name: Hassan Riad
three.bio: Runs delivery. Has never missed a published handover date — and mentions it often.

four.name: Salma Nour
four.bio: Manages the 890. If you've bought through Rise, you have her mobile number.

cta.title: Come see the book
cta.description: The portfolio, the models, the fee schedule. Thirty minutes, no obligation.

services.title: One team, the whole lifecycle
services.lead: Acquisition, delivery and management under one roof — so nobody gets to blame the other guy.

investment.title: Investment advisory
investment.body: We model your capital against the market, then bring you three to five assets that fit — each with a yield forecast, a five-year cost model and the comparables behind it. You get the reasoning, not just the recommendation.

features.two: Full yield and cash-flow modelling per asset
features.three: Off-market access through our developer desk

buying.title: Buying
buying.body: Negotiation, due diligence, contracts, registration and handover inspection. We run the whole transaction and hand you a snag-free unit — including the paperwork most firms leave you to chase alone.

features.one: Price negotiation on your side of the table
features.two: Legal due diligence and title verification
features.four: Snagging inspection before you sign off

selling.title: Selling
selling.tagline: Priced to move, not to linger
selling.body: We price against real closed comparables, stage and shoot the asset properly, and take it to our investor book before it ever hits a portal. Most Rise resales close off-market.

features.one: Valuation from closed — not asking — comparables

management.title: Property management
management.tagline: It earns without becoming a job
management.body: Tenant sourcing and vetting, rent collection, maintenance, compliance and quarterly reporting. Ninety-four percent of our management clients renew, which is the only metric here worth quoting.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.body: Feasibility studies, unit-mix optimisation, pricing strategy and market positioning for developers and funds. We've underwritten 2.4 billion of it — we'll tell you if your plan doesn't clear the hurdle.

cta.title: Not sure which one you need?
cta.description: Most clients start with a thirty-minute call and leave knowing exactly which service — sometimes none of them.

contact.title: Talk to the investment desk
contact.lead: A named advisor, usually within two hours. Bring your budget and your horizon.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Fill this in and an advisor will come back to you — no call centre, no drip campaign.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us what you're looking for, and your timeline…

form.consent: I agree to be contacted by Rise about my enquiry.

success.title: Message sent
success.body: Thanks — an advisor will be in touch within two hours during business hours.

error.title: That didn't send
error.body: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again, or call us directly.

validation.nameMin: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.interestRequired: Please choose what you're interested in.
validation.messageMin: Please give us a little more detail (at least 10 characters).
validation.consentRequired: We need your consent to reply to you.

footer.about: Rise designs, delivers and manages premium real estate assets across the region. Licensed, regulated, and still answering the phone after handover.

newsletter.title: The Rise brief
newsletter.description: New assets and a short market read. Once a month, no filler.
newsletter.success: You're in — see you next month.
newsletter.error: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.privacy: We never share your address. Unsubscribe anytime.

footer.rights: © {year} Rise Real Estate. All rights reserved.

whatsapp.label: Chat with us on WhatsApp
whatsapp.prefill: Hello Rise — I'd like to ask about a property.

notFound.title: This one's off the map
notFound.description: The page you're after has moved or never existed. The portfolio, however, is right where you left it.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred on our side. Try again — and if it keeps happening, our desk would like to hear about it.
